opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 214 Google reviews with no visible owner responses in the last 7 months.
opportunities.observation: Unanswered reviews signal to prospects that customer relationships end at the invoice.
opportunities.fix: An AI response workflow drafts and posts a personalized reply to every review — 5-star or 1-star — in minutes.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No email or text marketing touchpoints visible on the website or in review patterns.
opportunities.observation: Every past customer is a recurring revenue opportunity you're currently leaving silent.
opportunities.fix: An AI reminder system re-engages past customers before each season with personalized maintenance offers.

opportunities.label: Post-Job Follow-Up Sequences
opportunities.signal: Review velocity is low relative to job volume — suggesting no automated review request after service.
opportunities.observation: Businesses that don't ask don't get reviews. Your competitors who do are widening the gap.
opportunities.fix: An AI follow-up sequence texts every customer 24 hours after job close — asking for a review and offering a referral incentive.

opportunities.label: Lead Capture & Scheduling
opportunities.signal: No online booking on website — calls only, no after-hours capture.
opportunities.observation: When a pipe bursts at 9pm, the first plumber with instant booking gets the job.
opportunities.fix: An AI scheduling layer captures and books jobs 24/7 — no missed calls, no lost leads.

opportunities.label: Key-Person Dependency
opportunities.signal: 9 of your last 15 Google reviews mention the owner by first name.
opportunities.observation: When your reputation is personal, scaling or stepping back risks everything you've built.
opportunities.fix: AI-assisted CRM and handoff workflows distribute trust to your team — not just you.

opportunities.label: Quote Turnaround Automation
opportunities.signal: Three recent reviews mention waiting 2+ days for a quote or callback.
opportunities.observation: Slow quotes lose jobs — most homeowners book whoever responds first.
opportunities.fix: An AI quoting tool generates same-day estimates from job photos or a short phone intake.
